[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110011 4
1 1101101110 7
2 1010000100 3
3 1001101110 6
4 1101010101 6
5 0100110011 5
6 1101010010 5
7 0101011001 5

01 10 1010000100 3 match 2
12 21 1001101110 6 match 3
23 32 1101010101 6 match 4
34 43 0100110011 5 match 5
45 54 1101010010 5 match 6
56 65 0101011001 5 match 7
67 76 1111011010 7
70 07 1101011101 7

02 20 0011101010 5
13 31 0100111011 6
24 42 1001100110 5
35 53 1001100001 4
46 64 1000001011 4
57 75 1010000011 4
60 06 0010000111 4
71 17 0111011001 6

14 41 0000001000 1
25 52 0100110100 4
36 63 1100111000 5
47 74 0111010001 5
50 05 0111011110 7
61 16 1000000011 3
72 27 1110110111 8

26 62 0001101101 5
37 73 0011100010 4
